ticker: # HOW TO USE:
# 1. Run rsi_scanner.py — it prints a ready-to-paste CSV row for each signal
# 2. Copy that row here
# 3. Fill in your ACTUAL fills (entry_stock
# 4. Run: python trade_tracker.py          — check status + alerts
# 5. When you close a trade: set status=WIN or LOSS
# 6. git add my_trades.csv && git commit -m "update trades"
# COLUMNS:
#   ticker        — stock symbol (e.g. NVDA)
#   entry_date    — date you entered (YYYY-MM-DD)
#   entry_stock   — stock price at your actual fill
#   strike        — option strike price
#   option_type   — C (call) or P (put)
#   expiry        — option expiry date (YYYY-MM-DD)
#   entry_option  — option premium you actually paid per share
#   target_stock  — stock price where option gains +50% (from scanner)
#   stop_stock    — stock price 10% below entry_stock (from scanner)
#   target_option — option price at +50% gain (from scanner)
#   sigma_pct     — IV% used for repricing (from scanner
#   status        — OPEN / WIN / LOSS
#   exit_date     — date closed (leave blank if open)
#   exit_stock    — stock price at exit (leave blank if open)
#   exit_option   — option price at exit (leave blank if open)
#   pnl_pct       — realized P&L % on option (leave blank if open)
#   notes         — anything you want to remember about this trade
